title: Macroeconomic Indicators and S&P 500 Returns
description: Monthly macroeconomic indicators (CPI, federal funds rate, unemployment) merged with S&P 500 returns, retrieved from the FRED API. Built for a regression analysis of how inflation, interest rates, and labor market conditions relate to equity returns from 2016-2026.
creator: Brendan Smith
Christopher Boukalis
publisher: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis (FRED)

variables.month: Monthly date, used as primary key
variables.sp500_monthly_avg: Monthly average of daily S&P 500 closes

fair_principles: Metadata, source URLs, and processing scripts are versioned in the repo. SHA-256 checksums for output files are in Results/Tables/fred_checksums.txt.
